title: CI-RED-016-A: manifest-discipline bleed-stop wired into Core CI
intent: CI-RED-016-A is the small enforcement slice of CI-RED-016: stop net-new router files from bypassing router_registry discipline while the larger endpoint consolidation stays deferred. It is a ratchet, not a cleanup migration - it does not manifest the 107 grandfathered routers, resolve endpoint ownership, reorder precedence, change live endpoint winners, or close CI-RED-016. Tighten the committed baseline from 108 to 107 (remove the one healed entry routers/cam/geometry_authority_router, now manifested by CI-RED-015-H), add focused unit tests for check_manifest_discipline.py, wire the check into Core CI before API boot/full pytest, and correct stale UNRUN/uncommitted status language.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) manifest_discipline_baseline.txt: tightened 108->107, removing only routers/cam/geometry_authority_router, which healed when CI-RED-015-H manifested it (RouterSpec module=app.routers.cam.geometry_authority_router in cam_manifest.py). Witnessed by set difference (comm -3 of header-stripped sorted sets), not line diff: exactly one healed entry, zero net-new. (2) check_manifest_discipline.py: replaced the 'UNRUN as of 2026-05-30' docstring STATUS block with materialized/baseline-backed/CI-wired status; ratchet semantics (fail only on net-new unmanifested routers) unchanged, no logic edit. (3) tests/test_manifest_discipline.py (new): 12 focused unit tests importing the script by path (no app.main import) with tmp_path miniature app tree and monkeypatched APP_ROOT/MANIFEST_DIR/BASELINE_PATH; covers module_to_relpath, decorator detection, non-router ignore, manifested/aggregator exclusion, net-new fail (exit 1), healed-reported-pass, --update-baseline sorted rewrite, clean pass, and missing-baseline bootstrap; negative fixtures live only in tmp_path. (4) core_ci.yml: added a 'Manifest discipline bleed-stop' step to the api-tests job after 'Cost Attribution Unit Tests' and before 'Boot API'/'Run pytest'. (5) CI_RED_015D_OPEN_DECISIONS.md: annotated stale uncommitted/untracked/unrun language as historical and added a CI-RED-016-A status note; 015-D closure logic and CI-RED-016 deferral preserved. (6) SPRINTS.md: recorded CI-RED-016-A subnote under CI-RED-016 as a bleed-stop only.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: No prior workflow invoked check_manifest_discipline.py, so the ratchet was inert - a net-new unmanifested @router file could land silently. This PR makes it a CI witness step and tightens the baseline to the current healed count so the grandfathered set cannot silently grow. The test file did not exist, so the checker had zero coverage. Endpoint consolidation (CI-RED-016) is untouched and remains open.

commands_run: cd services/api && python scripts/check_manifest_discipline.py -> OK: no net-new unmanifested router files (baseline holds 107)
set witness: comm -3 <(before) <(after) -> only left-only routers/cam/geometry_authority_router; right-only empty; before=108 after=107
cd services/api && python -m pytest tests/test_manifest_discipline.py -q -> 12 passed (Python 3.11.9, api venv)
yaml.safe_load(core_ci.yml) parse OK; asserted 'Manifest discipline bleed-stop' step index < 'Boot API' step index in api-tests job

files.intent: Tighten baseline 108->107; remove only the healed geometry_authority_router entry
files.behavior_change: none - frozen-set ratchet data, tightened after a witnessed heal

files.intent: Correct stale UNRUN status text; ratchet semantics unchanged
files.behavior_change: none - docstring/status only, no logic change

files.intent: Add 12 focused unit tests via tmp_path + monkeypatched path globals
Run the manifest-discipline check in api-tests before API boot/full pytest
Annotate stale uncommitted/untracked/unrun language as historical; preserve 015-D closure logic
Record CI-RED-016-A as a bleed-stop only under CI-RED-016
